golden_set_metadata.description: Hand-validated metadata for Phase 1.5 testing. Extracted from actual RFP fixtures by manual review.
golden_set_metadata.note: This is the ground truth for validating Phase 1.5 enhancements.

title.reason: Phase 1 takes first non-empty line, which is document-type header

title.reason: First line is document-type header, actual title is on line 3

section_headings.impact: Section may be merged with previous content

golden_truth.title: Multi-Modal Transport Network Analytics Platform

golden_truth.due_date_note: Line 6 has 'Closing Date: April 15, 2026'. Line 7 'Due: 2 PM Eastern Time' is missing the date component.

complex_rfp.type: US Government RFP with complex date patterns

issuer.phase1_extracted: Department of Energy (DOE) - Energy Efficiency & Renewable Energy (EERE)
issuer.reason: Phase 1 successfully matches 'Contract Agency:' via the 'Agency:' regex pattern (substring match works)

due_date.phase1_issue: Multiple dates exist. Line 6 'Posted:', Line 7 'Closing:', Line 8 'Questions Due:' - parser needs to pick the right one

golden_truth.title: DATA ANALYTICS PLATFORM DEVELOPMENT
golden_truth.issuer: Department of Energy (DOE) - Energy Efficiency & Renewable Energy (EERE)
golden_truth.issuer_note: Uses 'Contract Agency:' pattern (not in Phase 1 parser regex list). Complex name with compound structure.
golden_truth.due_date_note: Line 7 'Closing:' is the submission deadline. Line 8 'Questions Due: April 1st' is an earlier cutoff, not the deadline.
golden_truth.section_detection_challenge: Roman numerals with inconsistent capitalization (lowercase 'v' instead of 'V' on line 52)

key_improvements_needed.title_extraction: All 5 UK RFPs have document-type headers as first line. Phase 1 needs to look for 'Solicitation Title:' or equivalent field.
key_improvements_needed.issuer_extraction: Compound entity names need validation (Northern Universities Consortium). Phase 1 does recognize 'Contract Agency:' via 'Agency:' substring match.
key_improvements_needed.date_disambiguation: complex_rfp.txt has multiple dates (Posted, Closing, Questions Due). Phase 1 needs to pick submission deadline, not first match.
key_improvements_needed.section_detection: uk_transport_network_data_system.txt has 'Evaluation Factors' in title case (not all-caps). Phase 1 parser misses non-all-caps headings.
key_improvements_needed.requirement_categorization: No fixture shows Phase 1 categorizing MANDATORY vs OPTIONAL. Phase 1.5 needs to tag sections by type.
